pilot_tasks.name: Pilot: Fano Factor Control
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: CV remains significant predictor after Fano factor control (p < 0.05 raw, uncorrected for pilot)

pilot_tasks.name: Pilot: Non-Absorbed Baseline
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: Absorbed high-CV steering effect > 40% of non-absorbed effect

pilot_tasks.name: Pilot: Cross-Architecture Gemma-2
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: CV effect direction matches GPT-2 (high-CV > low-CV) with raw p < 0.10

pilot_tasks.name: Pilot: Held-Out Activation Patching
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: Mean recovery > 25% on held-out words (relaxed from pilot's 30% due to smaller n)

pilot_summary.go_decision_threshold: 3/4 pilots must pass pass_criteria to proceed to full experiments
pilot_summary.pilot_failure_handling: If a pilot fails, analyze whether the failure is due to (a) small sample noise -> increase n and retry pilot, (b) fundamental issue -> redesign experiment, (c) expected negative result -> report as negative and skip full experiment
